role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text/script evidence and abstained from linguistic analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, climate, and settlement patterns consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (scrub, conifers) and agricultural structures (greenhouses).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed utility pole designs, road markings, and fencing styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (infrastructure + architecture) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified South Korea. The agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence focusing on specific infrastructure details (utility poles, fencing) that are highly characteristic of the region. The linguistic agent correctly noted the absence of text, while others leveraged visual cues effectively.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hills, overcast sky, and buildings match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of dormant scrub and distant conifers match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete poles, cross-arms, and white fencing match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of visual cues is accurate.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The final prediction was correct (South Korea).
